encounters.name: Jungle Ambush
encounters.description: The party pushes through dense Chult jungle when the canopy darkens. Giant spiders drop from above while constrictor snakes slither from the undergrowth. The yuan-ti cult has been using the jungle predators to thin out intruders before they reach the temple.

encounters.name: Temple Entrance
encounters.description: The party finds the sunken temple half-buried in jungle earth, its stone steps leading down into darkness. Giant scorpions patrol the entrance while yuan-ti infiltrators in disguise attempt to trick the party into lowering their guard.

encounters.name: Inner Chambers
encounters.description: Deep within the temple, the party discovers ancient chambers filled with poison gas traps and yuan-ti cultists performing a ritual. A yuan-ti malison leads the ceremony, its serpentine magic twisting the air itself.

encounters.name: The Serpent's Heart
encounters.description: The cult's leader, a yuan-ti abomination named Kethis, awaits in the temple's inner sanctum. Ancient murals depict Kethis as a fallen chultan hero who made a pact with serpentine gods. The party must stop Kethis from completing the ritual that will awaken an ancient serpent god's avatar.

encounters.name: Temple Collapse
encounters.description: With Kethis defeated, the temple begins to collapse. The party must navigate crumbling corridors, rising floodwaters, and collapsing ceilings as they escape. The yuan-ti cult's ritual has destabilized the ancient structure.
